summary: MoeGo Phase 3 - Payments & Customer Portal Testing Complete. All backend payment APIs working correctly in mock mode. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in payments service. Frontend Customer Portal loads correctly with all tabs and SavedCardsManager component.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in payments.py - added .pop('_id', None) after insert_one() calls
Square Payments API is MOCKED (mock_mode=true) - no SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN configured
Customer Portal restricted to 'customer' role only - admin users redirected to Admin Dashboard

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed, 1 skipped - rebook requires completed booking)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All tabs and components render correctly

seed_data_creation: Created test cards and payments during API testing (auto-cleaned by test fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 payments and portal fully tested. All payment endpoints work in mock mode. Customer Portal accessible at /customer/portal for customer role users only.

save_card.details: Accepts source_id, cardholder_name, postal_code - returns mock VISA card

get_cards.details: Returns user's saved cards with count

portal_upcoming.details: Returns customer's upcoming bookings with dog and kennel info

portal_invoices.details: Returns payment receipts with booking details

rebook.details: Requires completed booking in history - none available for test user

customer_portal_page.details: Page loads with data-testid='customer-portal-page', all 4 tabs present

saved_cards_manager.details: Component renders with data-testid='add-card-btn', mock mode notice, card form dialog

mocked_apis.square_payments: MOCKED - mock_mode=true, simulates all payment operations

bugs_fixed.fix: Added .pop('_id', None) after insert_one() in save_card(), create_deposit_hold(), create_payment(), and refund_payment() methods
